body:
Hey sweetheart,

Mike confirmed the Memphis run, so I should be able to make Nashville Thursday evening. Go ahead and pick the place, anything's fine with me, you know I'm not picky. Can't wait to see you and those office party photos.

Love,
Dad
subject: Re: Dinner when you come through Nashville?

body:
Hi Travis,

Next quarter when the resupply comes due, can you add a second mask cushion to the order? The dry air in the cab seems to wear them out faster. Let me know if insurance will cover the extra one.

Thanks,
Anthony
subject: Re: Your CPAP resupply order is confirmed
